descriptions: 99% cotton 1% silver, inherent antiviral t-shirt fabric with silver yarn integrated.
ArShirt Antiviral fabrics are mostly used for medical applications with superior antiviral functions.
ArShirt Antiviral is tested for ISO 18184.
